metadata.title: Freight Logistics Orchestration Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, operational, financial, compliance, and sensitive data assets for the freight logistics orchestration domain.

assets.name: Shipper Account
assets.description: Shipper organization, users, contracts, billing setup, service policies, facilities, and integration profile.
assets.accessScope: shipper portal, TMS, billing, support, and integrations
assets.businessMeaning: Source of truth for shipper eligibility, commercial terms, operating policies, and user access.

interfaces.name: shipper-account api
interfaces.description: Access interface for shipper account and policy data.

governance.sharingPolicy: restricted to shipper, operations, finance, and support workflows

assets.name: Carrier Profile
assets.description: Carrier identity, authority, insurance, safety, equipment, contacts, bank, tax, compliance, and operating preferences.
assets.accessScope: carrier onboarding, matching, booking, tracking, payment, risk, and support
assets.businessMeaning: Core supply-side identity and eligibility data for freight execution and settlement.

interfaces.name: carrier-profile api
interfaces.description: Access interface for carrier eligibility and profile data.

governance.sharingPolicy: restricted to capacity, compliance, payment, and operations workflows

assets.name: Shipment Record
assets.description: Canonical shipment, load, stop, tender, carrier, appointment, visibility, document, cost, and settlement references.
assets.accessScope: TMS, tendering, visibility, operations, audit, settlement, and analytics
assets.businessMeaning: Central business object connecting demand, carrier supply, execution, documents, and finance.

governance.retention: commercial and tax retention by market
governance.sharingPolicy: customer-visible shipment data controlled by account permissions

assets.name: Contract Rate
assets.description: Awarded lane rates, fuel rules, accessorial terms, routing guide commitments, mode rules, and effective dates.
assets.accessScope: procurement, tendering, quoting, audit, and settlement
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial source for pricing, routing guide, and invoice validation decisions.

interfaces.name: contract-rate api
interfaces.description: Access interface for active and historical rate terms.

governance.sharingPolicy: restricted by customer, carrier, and commercial role

assets.name: Visibility Event
assets.description: Location, milestone, geofence, ETA, tracking source, appointment, arrival, departure, and dwell events.
assets.accessScope: visibility, exception management, analytics, and customer status updates
assets.businessMeaning: Operational signal set used to predict risk, report status, and measure service quality.

interfaces.name: visibility api
interfaces.description: Access interface for shipment milestones and ETA.

governance.sharingPolicy: shared only for shipment execution, customer visibility, and compliance-approved analytics

assets.name: Freight Invoice
assets.description: Carrier invoices, shipper bills, accessorials, fuel, detention, taxes, accruals, audit results, disputes, and allocation references.
assets.accessScope: freight audit, payment, billing, claims, finance, and reporting
assets.businessMeaning: Financial record connecting operational shipment facts to payable, receivable, and accrual workflows.

interfaces.name: freight-invoice api
interfaces.description: Access interface for invoice and audit state.
